Idea: Return in Korean: (1) hash/reading confirmation, (2) 5-10 durable knowledge points you learned and can use later, (3) P0/P1 risks or ambiguities, (4) one-line verdict.
User preference: - Always loaded into the system prompt.

User preference: Do not suggest generic project-quality, onboarding, exploration, cleanup, refactor, documentation, test-writing, or dependency-update tasks merely because they could be useful to someone who owns this project.
User preference: Do not suggest tasks that merely sound productive or create more work for the user.

User preference: I will present you with two categories of content: things to **ALWAYS** exclude, and things which you should exclude if they are about the user (**unless** the recent user context shows the user has specifically asked for it).
User preference: Policies to always exclude
